# gDRplots

The `gDRplots` package is intended to store functions for gDR static
visualizations and their dedicated helpers.

# Website

A package website is available under [this
link](https://gdrplatform.github.io/gDRplots/).

# Package index

## Single-agent plots

Function to plot drug response curves for single-agent data

- [`plot_boxplot_metric_sa()`](https://gdrplatform.github.io/gDRplots/reference/plot_boxplot_metric_sa.md)
  : Plot box plots for metric for single-agent data grouped by selected
  variable
- [`plot_boxplot_metric_sa_by_CLs()`](https://gdrplatform.github.io/gDRplots/reference/plot_boxplot_metric_sa_by_CLs.md)
  : Plot box plots for metric for single-agent data grouped by cell line
  names
- [`plot_boxplot_metric_sa_by_drugs()`](https://gdrplatform.github.io/gDRplots/reference/plot_boxplot_metric_sa_by_drugs.md)
  : Plot box plots for metric for single-agent data grouped by drug
  names
- [`plot_boxplot_metric_sa_by_grp()`](https://gdrplatform.github.io/gDRplots/reference/plot_boxplot_metric_sa_by_grp.md)
  : Plot box plots for metric for single-agent data grouped by selected
  variable
- [`plot_dose_response_sa()`](https://gdrplatform.github.io/gDRplots/reference/plot_dose_response_sa.md)
  : Plot drug response curves for single-agent data
- [`plot_dose_response_sa_by_CLs()`](https://gdrplatform.github.io/gDRplots/reference/plot_dose_response_sa_by_CLs.md)
  : Plot drug response curves for single-agent data for selected call
  lines and drugs
- [`plot_dose_response_sa_by_drugs()`](https://gdrplatform.github.io/gDRplots/reference/plot_dose_response_sa_by_drugs.md)
  : Plot drug response curves for single-agent data for selected call
  lines and drugs

## Combo plots

Function to plot averaged values heatmaps for combo data

- [`heatmap_combo_metrics()`](https://gdrplatform.github.io/gDRplots/reference/heatmap_combo_metrics.md)
  : Plot heatmaps of fitted values for combination metrics data
- [`heatmap_combo_metrics_panel()`](https://gdrplatform.github.io/gDRplots/reference/heatmap_combo_metrics_panel.md)
  : Plot panel of heatmaps of fitted values for combination metrics data
- [`heatmap_combo_with_isoref()`](https://gdrplatform.github.io/gDRplots/reference/heatmap_combo_with_isoref.md)
  : Plot heatmaps of averaged values for combination data
- [`heatmap_combo_with_isoref_panel()`](https://gdrplatform.github.io/gDRplots/reference/heatmap_combo_with_isoref_panel.md)
  : Plot panel of heatmaps with fitted and reference data for
  isobolograms
- [`heatmap_combo_with_isoref_panel_common()`](https://gdrplatform.github.io/gDRplots/reference/heatmap_combo_with_isoref_panel_common.md)
  : \#' Plot panel of heatmaps with fitted and reference data for
  isobolograms
- [`heatmap_combo_with_isoref_panel_independent()`](https://gdrplatform.github.io/gDRplots/reference/heatmap_combo_with_isoref_panel_independent.md)
  : Plot panel of heatmaps with fitted and reference data for
  isobolograms
- [`plot_boxplot_metric_combo()`](https://gdrplatform.github.io/gDRplots/reference/plot_boxplot_metric_combo.md)
  : Plot box plots for metric for combo data grouped by selected
  variable
- [`plot_boxplot_metric_combo_by_CLs()`](https://gdrplatform.github.io/gDRplots/reference/plot_boxplot_metric_combo_by_CLs.md)
  : Plot box plots for metric for combo data grouped by cell line names
- [`plot_boxplot_metric_combo_by_drugs()`](https://gdrplatform.github.io/gDRplots/reference/plot_boxplot_metric_combo_by_drugs.md)
  : Plot box plots for metric for combo data grouped by drug names
- [`plot_boxplot_metric_combo_by_grp()`](https://gdrplatform.github.io/gDRplots/reference/plot_boxplot_metric_combo_by_grp.md)
  : Plot box plots for metric for combo data grouped by selected
  variable
- [`plot_combination_index()`](https://gdrplatform.github.io/gDRplots/reference/plot_combination_index.md)
  : Plot line plot of combination index
- [`plot_dose_response_combo()`](https://gdrplatform.github.io/gDRplots/reference/plot_dose_response_combo.md)
  : Plot drug response curves for combo data
- [`plot_dose_response_combo_panel()`](https://gdrplatform.github.io/gDRplots/reference/plot_dose_response_combo_panel.md)
  : Plot panel with drug response curves for single-agent data to
  control quality of the data

## Quality control plots for Processing Report

QC plots for Processing Report with all helpers

- [`heatmap_control_mapping_qc()`](https://gdrplatform.github.io/gDRplots/reference/heatmap_control_mapping_qc.md)
  : Plot heatmap of mapping controls to treated for single-agent and
  combo data to control quality of the data
- [`pheatmap_qc()`](https://gdrplatform.github.io/gDRplots/reference/pheatmap_qc.md)
  : Plot pretty heatmap for single-agent or combo data to control
  quality of the data
- [`plot_dose_response_sa_qc()`](https://gdrplatform.github.io/gDRplots/reference/plot_dose_response_sa_qc.md)
  : Plot drug response curves for single-agent data to control quality
  of the data
- [`plot_dose_response_sa_qc_panel()`](https://gdrplatform.github.io/gDRplots/reference/plot_dose_response_sa_qc_panel.md)
  : Plot panel with drug response curves for single-agent data to
  control quality of the data
- [`plot_fitting_acc()`](https://gdrplatform.github.io/gDRplots/reference/plot_fitting_acc.md)
  : Visualization for the quality control of the fitting for
  single-agent data
- [`plot_plate()`](https://gdrplatform.github.io/gDRplots/reference/plot_plate.md)
  : Plot data from a specific column
- [`plot_plate_stack_info()`](https://gdrplatform.github.io/gDRplots/reference/plot_plate_stack_info.md)
  : Plot plate data (Heatmap + Dose Ranks + Smart Legend + Explicit QC)
- [`plot_single_plate_stack_info()`](https://gdrplatform.github.io/gDRplots/reference/plot_single_plate_stack_info.md)
  : Plot a single plate's stack info
- [`plot_var_distribution_qc()`](https://gdrplatform.github.io/gDRplots/reference/plot_var_distribution_qc.md)
  : Plot a violin plot for normalized or averaged data (single-agent and
  combo) to control the quality of the data
- [`plot_var_stat_qc()`](https://gdrplatform.github.io/gDRplots/reference/plot_var_stat_qc.md)
  : Lollipop plot for metric single-agent data to control quality of the
  data

## Pretty heatmap with annotation

Functions to plot annotated heatmap with helpers

- [`get_hm_title()`](https://gdrplatform.github.io/gDRplots/reference/get_hm_title.md)
  : Get Legend Title
- [`pheatmap_with_anno_cd()`](https://gdrplatform.github.io/gDRplots/reference/pheatmap_with_anno_cd.md)
  : Plot pretty heatmap with annotations for co-dilution data
- [`pheatmap_with_anno_combo()`](https://gdrplatform.github.io/gDRplots/reference/pheatmap_with_anno_combo.md)
  : Plot pretty heatmap with annotations for combo data
- [`pheatmap_with_anno_combo_metrics()`](https://gdrplatform.github.io/gDRplots/reference/pheatmap_with_anno_combo_metrics.md)
  : Plot heatmap with annotations for combo metrics data
- [`pheatmap_with_anno_sa()`](https://gdrplatform.github.io/gDRplots/reference/pheatmap_with_anno_sa.md)
  : Plot pretty heatmap with annotations for single-agent data
- [`prep_pheatmap_matrix()`](https://gdrplatform.github.io/gDRplots/reference/prep_pheatmap_matrix.md)
  : Prep matrix with metric value based on the Metrics assay

## PRISM visualisation

Functions to plot PRISM visualisation with helpers

- [`create_PRISM_plot_list_combo()`](https://gdrplatform.github.io/gDRplots/reference/create_PRISM_plot_list_combo.md)
  : Create a nested list of plots for PRISM data with combo metrics
- [`create_PRISM_plot_list_sa()`](https://gdrplatform.github.io/gDRplots/reference/create_PRISM_plot_list_sa.md)
  : Create a nested list of plots for PRISM data with single-agent
  metrics
- [`create_PRISM_summary_list()`](https://gdrplatform.github.io/gDRplots/reference/create_PRISM_summary_list.md)
  : Create a list of PRISM association table
- [`.create_PRISM_plot_list()`](https://gdrplatform.github.io/gDRplots/reference/dot-create_PRISM_plot_list.md)
  : Create a list of PRISM plots for a selected type of experiment
- [`.get_data_type()`](https://gdrplatform.github.io/gDRplots/reference/dot-get_data_type.md)
  : Check data type
- [`.get_n_top_asssoc()`](https://gdrplatform.github.io/gDRplots/reference/dot-get_n_top_asssoc.md)
  : Get n-top linear associations
- [`plot_boxplot_meta()`](https://gdrplatform.github.io/gDRplots/reference/plot_boxplot_meta.md)
  : Plot boxplot for metric values grouped by metadata from DepMap
- [`plot_boxplot_num()`](https://gdrplatform.github.io/gDRplots/reference/plot_boxplot_num.md)
  : Plot boxplot for categorical features
- [`plot_boxplot_num_panel()`](https://gdrplatform.github.io/gDRplots/reference/plot_boxplot_num_panel.md)
  : Plot panel with boxplots
- [`plot_scatter_with_corr()`](https://gdrplatform.github.io/gDRplots/reference/plot_scatter_with_corr.md)
  : Plot scatter with correlation
- [`plot_scatter_with_corr_panel()`](https://gdrplatform.github.io/gDRplots/reference/plot_scatter_with_corr_panel.md)
  : Plot panel with scatter with correlation
- [`plot_volcano_assoc()`](https://gdrplatform.github.io/gDRplots/reference/plot_volcano_assoc.md)
  : Volcano plot with association
- [`plot_volcano_assoc_panel()`](https://gdrplatform.github.io/gDRplots/reference/plot_volcano_assoc_panel.md)
  : Plot panel with volcano plot and according to the data type -
  scatter plots or box plots
- [`prep_dt_assoc()`](https://gdrplatform.github.io/gDRplots/reference/prep_dt_assoc.md)
  : Prep table with calculated linear associations
- [`prep_dt_response_dose_sa()`](https://gdrplatform.github.io/gDRplots/reference/prep_dt_response_dose_sa.md)
  : Prep table with metric values by doses for single-agent experiment
- [`prep_dt_response_metric_diff()`](https://gdrplatform.github.io/gDRplots/reference/prep_dt_response_metric_diff.md)
  : Prep table with metric values for combination experiment
- [`prep_dt_response_metric_sa()`](https://gdrplatform.github.io/gDRplots/reference/prep_dt_response_metric_sa.md)
  : Prep table with metric values for single-agent experiment
- [`prep_dt_response_scores()`](https://gdrplatform.github.io/gDRplots/reference/prep_dt_response_scores.md)
  : Prep table with metric values for combination experiment

## Color helpers

Plot color helpers

- [`fill_ann_color_map()`](https://gdrplatform.github.io/gDRplots/reference/fill_ann_color_map.md)
  : Fill missing values in the color map for annotation
- [`get_ann_color_map()`](https://gdrplatform.github.io/gDRplots/reference/get_ann_color_map.md)
  : Create color map for annotation
- [`get_col_luminance()`](https://gdrplatform.github.io/gDRplots/reference/get_col_luminance.md)
  : Calculate the luminance of a color
- [`get_iso_colors()`](https://gdrplatform.github.io/gDRplots/reference/get_iso_colors.md)
  : get_iso_colors
- [`get_qual_colors()`](https://gdrplatform.github.io/gDRplots/reference/get_qual_colors.md)
  : Create list of qualitative colors
- [`is_color_dark()`](https://gdrplatform.github.io/gDRplots/reference/is_color_dark.md)
  : Determine whether or not a color is dark
- [`is_valid_color()`](https://gdrplatform.github.io/gDRplots/reference/is_valid_color.md)
  : Determine whether or not a color name is valid

## Utils

Utils function

- [`compute_distances()`](https://gdrplatform.github.io/gDRplots/reference/compute_distances.md)
  : Compute distance between rows of a matrix.
- [`create_log_seq()`](https://gdrplatform.github.io/gDRplots/reference/create_log_seq.md)
  : create a log-sequence
- [`round_to_unique_string()`](https://gdrplatform.github.io/gDRplots/reference/round_to_unique_string.md)
  : Round numbers to unique string

## Chemical genomics visualisation

Functions to plot chemical genomics visualisation with helpers

- [`analyze_cgs()`](https://gdrplatform.github.io/gDRplots/reference/analyze_cgs.md)
  : Analyze Chemical Genomics (CGS) Data and Perform GSEA
- [`plot_cgs_ranking()`](https://gdrplatform.github.io/gDRplots/reference/plot_cgs_ranking.md)
  : Plot Chemical Genomics Screen GSEA Results

# Articles

### All vignettes

- [gDRplots](https://gdrplatform.github.io/gDRplots/articles/gDRplots.md):
